query:
You are a venture-capital analyst. For each of the 1 companies below, build an identity + financial profile from Crunchbase, Pitchbook, Dealroom, TechCrunch, Les Echos, official press releases, and LinkedIn About sections.

Companies:
  1. name="Linear", website="linear.app"

For EACH company extract:
- name (EXACTLY as listed above), website, hq_city, hq_country, founded_year
- employee_count (current LinkedIn headcount as integer)
- employee_growth_yoy (year-over-year change as decimal: +12% → 0.12)
- funding_stage (Seed / Series A / B / C / Public / Bootstrapped)
- funding_total_usd (cumulative raised in USD)
- last_round_amount_usd, last_round_date (YYYY-MM-DD), last_round_type
- funding_rounds: COMPLETE history — array of {round, amount_usd, date, lead} ordered chronologically. Aim for 2-5 rounds when available.
- notable_investors: distinct VCs/angels/corporates across all rounds. For each: {name, domain}. The domain is the investor's website (e.g. 'sequoiacap.com' for Sequoia Capital) — critical for logo display.
- arr_usd: ONLY if publicly disclosed (funding press, podcast). Do NOT estimate.
- customer_count: ONLY if officially announced.
- avg_contract_usd: ONLY if disclosed.
- acquisition: {acquired, acquirer, amount_eur, year, source_url}. Return acquired=false if not acquired.

Omit any field you cannot verify — do NOT pad with placeholders or guess. Return one object per company in the SAME order as the input list.
answer:
### Executive Summary
Linear is a San Francisco-based software development application founded in 2019 that has reached the Series C funding stage [Linear - Financial Details](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/linear-app/financial_details), [Linear (Software Development Applications) 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/343139-23). The company has raised approximately $149.2 million to date, recently closing an $82 million Series C round in July 2025 at a $1.25 billion valuation [Linear | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/linearapp), [More than 100 new tech unicorns were minted in 2025 — here they are | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/01/12/at-least-36-new-tech-unicorns-were-minted-in-2025-so-far/). As of mid-2025, Linear is profitable, generating over $20 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) from more than 15,000 paying customers [How Linear’s $82M Series C at $1.25B Valuation Supercharges AI-Driven Project Management Workflows - Applying AI](https://applyingai.com/2025/09/how-linears-82m-series-c-at-1-25b-valuation-supercharges-ai-driven-project-management-workflows/).

---

### Structured Data Extraction

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Linear",
    "website": "linear.app",
    "hq_city": "San Francisco",
    "hq_country": "United States",
    "founded_year": 2019,
    "funding_stage": "Series C",
    "funding_total_usd": 149200000,
    "last_round_amount_usd": 82000000,
    "last_round_date": "2025-07-10",
    "last_round_type": "Series C",
    "funding_rounds": [
      {
        "round": "Seed",
        "amount_usd": 4200000,
        "date": "2019-11-21",
        "lead": "Sequoia Capital"
      },
      {
        "round": "Series A",
        "amount_usd": 13000000,
        "date": "2020-12-08",
        "lead": "Sequoia Capital"
      },
      {
        "round": "Series B",
        "amount_usd": 35000000,
        "date": "2023-09-14",
        "lead": "Accel"
      },
      {
        "round": "Series C",
        "amount_usd": 82000000,
        "date": "2025-07-10",
        "lead": "Accel"
      }
    ],
    "notable_investors": [
      {
        "name": "Sequoia Capital",
        "domain": "sequoiacap.com"
      },
      {
        "name": "Accel",
        "domain": "accel.com"
      },
      {
        "name": "Index Ventures",
        "domain": "indexventures.com"
      },
      {
        "name": "Kleiner Perkins",
        "domain": "kleinerperkins.com"
      },
      {
        "name": "Charlie Cheever"
      },
      {
        "name": "Dylan Field"
      }
    ],
    "arr_usd": 20000000,
    "customer_count": 15000,
    "acquisition": {
      "acquired": false
    }
  }
]
```

---

### Detailed Analysis

**Corporate Identity & Leadership**
Linear was founded in 2019 by Karri Saarinen, Tuomas Artman, and Jori Lallo [Linear: In Search of Magic. When developers rave about the magic of… | by Stephanie Zhan | Sequoia Capital Publication | Medium](https://medium.com/sequoia-capital/linear-3cbc4ccbdf2b). The company operates in the software development applications sector and is headquartered in San Francisco, California, United States [Linear - Financial Details](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/linear-app/financial_details), [Linear (Software Development Applications) 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/343139-23). 

**Funding & Valuation History**
Linear has raised approximately $149.2 million across five funding rounds [Linear | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/linearapp). The company's chronological funding trajectory is as follows:
*   **Seed:** Announced on November 21, 2019, raising $4.2 million led by Sequoia Capital [Linear takes $4.2M led by Sequoia to build a better bug tracker and more | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2019/11/21/linear-lines-up-4-2m-led-by-sequoia-to-build-a-better-platform-for-software-developer-collaboration/).
*   **Series A:** Announced on December 8, 2020, raising $13 million led by Sequoia Capital [News - Linear](https://linear.app/now/news).
*   **Series B:** Announced on September 14, 2023, raising $35 million led by Accel. This round valued the company at approximately $400 million [Linear raises $35M Series B led by Accel - Linear](https://linear.app/now/series-b), [Linear's Developer Tools Are Popular — And Profitable. Now It's Raised $35 Million To Go Big.](https://www.forbes.com/sites/alexkonrad/2023/09/14/linear-developer-tools-raises-35-million-series-b/). *(Note: Erroneous reports of a $50 million Series B are likely conflated with a different company, LinearB, which raised $50 million in May 2022 [LinearB nabs $50M in round led by Tribe Capital](https://techcrunch.com/2022/05/02/linearb-wants-to-help-development-teams-optimize-their-workflows/)).*
*   **Series C:** Closed on July 10, 2025, raising $82 million led by Accel, alongside 10 other investors. This round elevated Linear to unicorn status with a $1.25 billion valuation [Linear | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/linearapp), [More than 100 new tech unicorns were minted in 2025 — here they are | TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/01/12/at-least-36-new-tech-unicorns-were-minted-in-2025-so-far/).

Notable institutional investors include Sequoia Capital, Accel, Index Ventures, and Kleiner Perkins [Where is Linear Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/linearapp). Individual angel investors include Charlie Cheever and Dylan Field [Linear - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/linear/469932035).

**Financials & Market Traction**
Linear has demonstrated strong financial performance, reaching profitability by mid-2025 [How Linear’s $82M Series C at $1.25B Valuation Supercharges AI-Driven Project Management Workflows - Applying AI](https://applyingai.com/2025/09/how-linears-82m-series-c-at-1-25b-valuation-supercharges-ai-driven-project-management-workflows/). During this same period, the company exceeded $20 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), representing a 200% year-over-year growth rate [How Linear’s $82M Series C at $1.25B Valuation Supercharges AI-Driven Project Management Workflows - Applying AI](https://applyingai.com/2025/09/how-linears-82m-series-c-at-1-25b-valuation-supercharges-ai-driven-project-management-workflows/). 

The platform serves over 15,000 paying customers, boasting a high-profile client roster that includes OpenAI, Scale AI, Perplexity, Ramp, and Cash App [How Linear’s $82M Series C at $1.25B Valuation Supercharges AI-Driven Project Management Workflows - Applying AI](https://applyingai.com/2025/09/how-linears-82m-series-c-at-1-25b-valuation-supercharges-ai-driven-project-management-workflows/). While an exact Average Contract Value (ACV) is not disclosed, Linear's premium SaaS pricing for advanced AI features is set at approximately $20 per user per month [How Linear’s $82M Series C at $1.25B Valuation Supercharges AI-Driven Project Management Workflows - Applying AI](https://applyingai.com/2025/09/how-linears-82m-series-c-at-1-25b-valuation-supercharges-ai-driven-project-management-workflows/).

---

### Gaps and Limitations
Based on the provided findings, the following requested data points could not be verified and were omitted from the structured output:
*   **Employee Count:** Current LinkedIn headcount was not disclosed in the source material.
*   **Employee Growth YoY:** No data regarding headcount growth was available.
*   **Average Contract Value (USD):** While per-user premium pricing (~$20/month) is available, the official average contract value per enterprise/customer was not explicitly disclosed.
*   **Angel Investor Domains:** Official website domains for individual investors Charlie Cheever and Dylan Field were not provided in the text.
